channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Why enterprises are replacing generic AI with tools that know their users
item.description: The future of AI isn’t just agentic; it’s deep personalization. Rather than simple recommender systems that correlate user behavior to identify patterns and apply those to individual workflows, large language models (LLMs) and AI agents can analyze users directly to create deeply personalized experiences. It’s this kind of aggressive customization users are increasingly demanding — and the savviest enterprises who provide it (and soon) will win. The goal is: “Don't try to randomize, or guess who I am. I tell you, this is what I care about,” Lijuan Qin, head of product, at Zoom AI, explains in ...

item.title: Google is reportedly testing a Gemini app for Mac
item.description: Google is testing a version of its Gemini app for macOS, Bloomberg reports. The app would bring the AI assistant to uncharted territory, and in more direct competition with OpenAI's ChatGPT and Anthropic's Claude, both of which offer standalone Mac apps.Gemini remains accessible through the web, and it sounds like the macOS app offers the same set of features, with the ability to respond to prompts, search the web and generate text, images and code. The major differentiator of the Mac app could be a feature called "Desktop Intelligence," which gives Gemini a new source of information and conte...

item.title: Cursor’s new coding model Composer 2 is here: It beats Claude Opus 4.6 but still trails GPT-5.4
item.description: Cursor, a San Francisco AI coding platform from startup Anysphere valued at $29.3 billion, has launched Composer 2, a new in-house coding model now available inside its agentic AI coding environment, and it offers drastically improved benchmarks from its prior in-house model.It's also launching and making Composer 2 Fast, a higher-priced but faster variant, the default experience for users.Here's the cost breakdown:Composer 2 Standard: $0.50/$2.50 per 1 million input/output tokens Composer 2 Fast: at $1.50/$7.50 per 1 million input/output tokensThat's a big drop from Cursor's predecessor in-h...

item.title: Amazon's preview Spring Sale is slashing up to 45% off some of my favorite robot vacuums — these are the 7 best deals
item.description: I'm a robot vacuum tester, and these are the models I'd recommend (plus some advice on what to avoid).

item.title: Marvel Beats Marvel in Quest for Most Watched Trailer
item.description: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' just bested not only 'Deadpool & Wolverine,' but 'Grand Theft Auto 6.'

item.title: Scientists Built Tiny, Portable Atomic Clocks—and Naturally, They’re Headed for Drones
item.description: This breakthrough in precision timing is about the size of your fingernail and only loses one second every 30,000 years.

item.title: Marc Andreessen is a philosophical zombie
item.description: I admit, this is an innovation I did not see coming: Silicon Valley has invented the philosophical zombie from the classic thought experiment "lol how crazy would it be if there were a philosophical zombie." Until recently, the philosophical zombie was a concept closely associated with Australian philosopher David Chalmers, who defines it as "someone […]...

item.title: Secure your Microsoft system or suffer the same fate as Stryker – US tells companies to secure corporate accounts
item.description: CISA says hackers are actively seeking targets and urges companies to bolster their defenses.

item.title: How to watch RB Leipzig vs. Hoffenheim online for free
item.description: How to watch Bundesliga for free. Watch RB Leipzig vs. Hoffenheim in the Bundesliga for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Is Reddit down? User-reported server error issue appears resolved
item.description: Reddit was inaccessible to some users Thursday, March 19. Here's everything we know so far.

item.title: The coolest game controller for your phone is $50 off
item.description: The MCON is the closest to a Swiss army knife that a controller can be. No, it doesn’t contain a can opener, but it makes up for it with a surprising array of features. Once you attach your MagSafe- or Pixelsnap-ready phone to the top plate, pressing a button along its top edge satisfyingly pops […]

item.title: Polymarket continues its partnership spree with a Major League Baseball deal
item.description: MLB is only the latest in a string of recently announced partnerships involving the prediction market.

item.title: NASA-Backed Startup to Try Ingenious Asteroid Mining Idea: Just Bag It
item.description: TransAstra has developed a plan to bag an asteroid and move it to a stable near-Earth orbit for processing.

item.title: AI is rewriting business in real time—and most leaders aren’t ready
item.description: Speaking with Fast Company at SXSW, experts share how business leaders can be more agile in the face of technological disruption. With AI capabilities doubling in a matter of months, agility is no longer a competitive advantage for business leaders—it’s now become a survival skill.

item.title: Another win for Intel as GMKTec demos Openclaw-capable mini PC that reaches 180 TOPS, supports 10GbE Ethernet, USB4, and OCuLink — oh, and there's a nifty pseudo-memory feature as well that will help you forget RAM nightmares
item.description: GMKtec introduces EVO-T2 mini PC with 180 TOPS performance, fast PCIe storage, and SSD-assisted memory to handle large AI models locally.

item.title: Higher Oil Prices From Trump’s Iran War Risk Killing the AI Boom, WTO Says
item.description: President Deals seems to be setting the global economy on fire.

item.title: Are you seeing viral ‘hacks’ for skipping long TSA airport security lines? Here’s what works—and what doesn’t
item.description: Frustrated passengers are taking to social media as wait times spike amid staffing shortages. Here are some tips and tricks for getting through the chaos. Some frustrated passengers are waiting hours in line at airports around the country, due to a stalemate over Department of Homeland Security funding, which has resulted in many TSA officers working without pay to walk off the job....

item.title: ‘The Wheel of Time’ Might Return to TV as an Animated Show
item.description: Prime Video's live-action series is no more, but Robert Jordan's fantasy books could live on in other media.

item.title: Apple vous demande de mettre à jour votre iPhone immédiatement : voici pourquoi c’est important
item.description: L'alerte est inhabituelle, il faut donc la prendre très au sérieux : Apple demande aux utilisateurs d'iPhone fonctionnant sous des versions obsolètes d'iOS de mettre à jour les appareils séance tenante. Des pirates pourraient s'en prendre à leurs données.

item.title: Historique, c’est notre premier 10/10 : test en vidéo du Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Ultra
item.description: Nous avons testé le Samsung Galaxy Book 6 Ultra, le tout premier produit à obtenir la note maximale au sein de notre rédaction. Dans notre vidéo, découvrez comment cet ordinateur portable parvient à concilier un format d'ultrabook avec des composants internes de pointe.

item.title: Gold and silver prices are tumbling again today: What’s happening with safe-haven assets?
item.description: While investors tend to flock to precious metals during geopolitical conflicts like the Iran war, other factors are inserting themselves this week. Gold and silver prices are plunging again.

item.title: Online bot traffic will exceed human traffic by 2027, Cloudflare CEO says
item.description: AI bots may outnumber humans online by 2027, says Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince, as generative AI agents dramatically increase web traffic and infrastructure demands.

item.title: Hermès doesn’t include a power adapter with its $5,150 charging case
item.description: Over a decade after Apple first partnered with Hermès for a special Apple Watch collaboration, the French luxury goods maker has released a new collection of leather-wrapped charging accessories for Apple's mobile devices. The most expensive option is a multi-device wireless charger in a case made from the brand's signature gold-colored calfskin leather that will […]...

item.title: Bluesky announces $100M Series B after CEO transition
item.description: The additional funds have been used to scale Bluesky's team, while the company continues to develop Bluesky's app and the underlying ATProto that powers it.

item.title: iPhone Air at 6 months — here’s what I love, what I hate, and why it’s ‘the most conflicted I’ve ever been about a phone’
item.description: Apple's iPhone Air has been out for six months — here's everything I've come to love and hate about the device in that time.

item.title: Apple TV fans will get a great free upgrade for discovering movies and TV shows soon, but there's a catch
item.description: Apple TV is changing the way it recommends movies and shows to you — say hello to 'Genius Browse'.

item.title: Sprite’s brand refresh is juicy, crispy, and ready to drink
item.description: The iconic ‘Lymon’ is back. If you’ve ever cracked open an ice-cold Sprite on a hot summer day, or taken a sip of the soda fresh from a McDonald’s machine, you’ve probably experienced that eye-widening first moment that the extra-fizzy, citrusy beverage hits your tongue.

item.title: FDA approves higher-dose version of Wegovy shots
item.description: Called Wegovy HD, the higher-dose drug helped participants in a study lose about 19% of their body weight. Federal regulators on Thursday approved a new higher-dose version of the blockbuster obesity drug Wegovy that may help users lose more weight and keep it off.

item.title: How to watch Cagliari vs. Napoli online for free
item.description: How to watch Serie A for free. Watch Cagliari vs. Napoli in Serie A for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Android will hide some app sideloading behind a new one-time security process
item.description: Google has detailed how users will be able to sideload apps from unverified developers once it implements its more restrictive policy towards downloading software on Android. The company originally planned to require all developers to be "verified" to distribute on Android, but softened its stance in November 2025 to allow carveouts for Android power-users and hobbyist developers. For the average Android users, the ability to sideload apps will now be locked behind a multi-step one-time process. Users will first have to enable developer mode in settings, confirm they're not being coached into ...

item.title: Installer des apps Android en dehors du Play Store va devenir beaucoup plus long et compliqué
item.description: La grande différence entre Android et iOS, c'est que le premier permet depuis toujours d'installer des applications en dehors de la boutique officielle. Une souplesse qui se paie par des problèmes de sécurité. Google n'a cessé de poser des barrières aux utilisateurs désirant marcher en dehors des clous, mais le nouveau dispositif se montre particulièrement contraignant....
